mechanism_narrative: Rising federal funds rates increase discount rates for future equity cash flows, directly compressing present valuations and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC exceeds 0.05 over a 2-year rolling window, or forward returns are positive in >55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Extreme consumer price index levels trigger aggressive central bank policy responses and erode real consumer purchasing power, causing immediate negative equity market reactions over the following month.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in >60% of triggered instances, or the signal loses predictive power when CPIAUCSL exceeds 290.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a stable unemployment rate indicate robust labor market absorption without wage-price spiral risks, supporting positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: The joint signal produces negative forward returns in >50% of cases, or the interaction term shows no statistical significance in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: A manufacturing index falling below its long-term trend signals supply chain bottlenecks and production contraction, which reduces corporate earnings expectations and drives negative short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: Forward 5-day returns are positive in >65% of triggered observations, or the threshold effect vanishes when controlling for monetary policy shifts.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real estate sales figures reflect strong household balance sheets and consumer confidence, which translates into higher corporate revenues and positive equity market performance over the next month.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or forward returns are negative in >55% of observations.

mechanism_narrative: Federal funds rates exceeding 1.0 percent mark a decisive shift to restrictive monetary policy, which increases borrowing costs for corporations and suppresses equity valuations over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward 60-day returns are positive in >60% of triggered instances, or the signal fails to predict direction when inflation expectations are anchored.

mechanism_narrative: Rising unemployment combined with elevated inflation creates stagflationary pressures that force central banks to maintain tight policy, resulting in negative equity returns over the following month.
failure_condition: The interaction effect yields positive forward returns in >50% of cases, or the joint condition shows no incremental predictive power over single-series models.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts dropping below 1.7 million units signals a sharp deceleration in construction activity and broader economic demand, leading to negative short-term equity market movements.
failure_condition: Forward 5-day returns are positive in >65% of triggered observations, or the signal loses predictive accuracy when mortgage rates decline simultaneously.
